item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-016","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer correctly reframes the apparent either/or into a conditional dependency: if retention is below threshold, growth is a leaky bucket and should not be scaled; if retention is validated, growth can be amplified. It avoids average-allocation advice and gives a clear decision rule with a narrow early-stage validation path."}
